options.name: -latency_file_prefix
options.description: Instead of applying changes, write commands to one latency file per analysis view. Any pre-existing files are overwritten.

options.name: -override_existing_latencies
options.description: Include all pins with existing latency offsets and overwrite the existing latency offsets.

options.name: -override_existing_latencies_pins
options.description: <instTerm>+ As per override_existing_latencies, but only for the specified list of pins. ((instTerm)+, optional)

options.name: -pins
options.description: Specify clock endpoint pins to consider. Defaults to all clock endpoints with the max/min_clock_tree_path attributes. ((instTerm)+, optional)

options.name: -sum_existing_latencies
options.description: Include all pins with existing latency offsets and sum the existing latency offset with the library specified offset

options.name: -sum_existing_latencies_pins
options.description: <instTerm>+ As per sum_existing_latencies, but only for the specified list of pins. ((instTerm)+, optional)

options.name: -views
options.description: Specify the analysis views to operate on. Defaults to all active analysis views.
